overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in a straw cloak walking across a frozen lake under the aurora borealis toward a traditional Japanese sake house. The scene transitions from open frozen wilderness to the warmly lit wooden building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen lake with dead forest under aurora

agents.ego_description: samurai wearing straw mino cloak walking steadily across frozen lake toward distant lit building

entered.detail: green glowing northern lights illuminating the night sky
snow-capped mountains silhouetted against the green sky
traditional wooden Japanese building with warm glowing lanterns
leafless pine trees scattered across the frozen landscape
smooth ice reflecting the green aurora light

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks across a vast frozen lake under the green glow of the aurora borealis. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance to the left while the Nakajima Sake House sits far to the right, its warm lights contrasting with the cold blue-green ice.

events.description: location discovery text 'NAKAJIMA SAKE HOUSE' appears on screen
character turns slightly right to approach the main entrance steps

agents.ego_description: approaching the sake house entrance, walking up snow-covered wooden steps toward the lit doorway

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing standing at the entrance of the sake house

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with warm orange glow
snow-covered wooden steps leading to the building entrance
deep snow with wooden walkways visible beneath

segments.scene_description: Leaving the frozen lake behind, the samurai approaches the Nakajima Sake House as the location text appears. The building looms larger with its snow-heavy gabled roof and glowing lanterns. A figure stands at the entrance as the character walks up the wooden steps, passing traditional stone lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a frozen wilderness that gradually closes in on the warm sanctuary of a traditional Japanese building. It begins with a samurai traversing a vast frozen lake under the ethereal green glow of the aurora borealis, with snow-capped mountains looming to the left and the distant lights of the Nakajima Sake House flickering to the right. As the character leaves the blue-green ice behind, the camera pushes forward, causing the sake house to loom larger with its snow-heavy gabled roof and glowing lanterns. The scene then shifts from the open expanse to the intimate approach of the building, passing traditional stone lanterns before finally ascending the wooden steps toward a figure waiting at the entrance.
